name: Dr Mohammad Raheem
specialization: Specialised in Root Canal Treatment & Advanced Implantology
bio:
Dr. Raheem Mohammad, BDS, MDS

Consultant Endodontist & Restorative Dentist

Dr. Raheem Mohammad is a highly skilled dental specialist with expertise in Conservative Dentistry and Endodontics. He completed his Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) from Government Dental College, Vijayawada and earned his Master of Dental Surgery (MDS) in Conservative Dentistry & Endodontics from Vishnu Dental College.

He is a proud member of the Indian Association of Conservative Dentistry and Endodontics and is committed to delivering evidence-based, patient-centered dental care.

His areas of expertise include advanced root canal treatments, retreatment of failed root canals, management of dental pain and infections, esthetic restorations, and preservation of natural teeth.

At Apex Dental Hospital, Dr. Raheem focuses on providing precise diagnosis, painless treatment, and personalized care using modern dental techniques and strict sterilization protocols.

His goal is to help every patient achieve optimal oral health while ensuring a comfortable and positive treatment experience.
education: MDS in Conservative Dentistry & Endodontics - Vishnu Dental College
fellowships: Member of the Indian Association of Conservative Dentistry and Endodontics
quote: Dedicated to preserving natural teeth and creating healthy, confident smiles.
areas_of_expertise: Management of dental pain and infections

name: Dr. Shiek Arshi Azeem
specialization: General Dentistry, Preventive Dentistry, Restorative Dentistry, Root Canal Treatments, and Cosmetic Dental Procedures
bio:
Dr. Shiek Arshi Azeem, BDS

Dental Surgeon

Dr. Shiek Arshi Azeem is a dedicated Dental Surgeon who graduated from Lenora Institute of Dental Sciences, Rajahmundry. With 6 years of clinical experience, she is committed to providing comprehensive dental care with a patient-centered approach.

She has expertise in the diagnosis, prevention, and treatment of various dental conditions, focusing on delivering safe, effective, and comfortable treatment experiences. Dr. Azeem continually strives to maintain high standards of dental care while ensuring patient comfort and satisfaction.

At Apex Dental Hospital, Dr. Shiek Arshi Azeem focuses on providing precise diagnosis, preventive dental care, restorative treatments, and cosmetic dental procedures using modern techniques and strict sterilization protocols. Her goal is to help every patient achieve optimal oral health while ensuring a comfortable and positive treatment experience.
education: BDS - Lenora Institute of Dental Sciences, Rajahmundry
quote: Dedicated to creating healthy smiles through quality dental care and compassionate service.

name: Dr. Priya Patel
specialization: Invisible Aligners, Clear Braces, Pediatric Orthodontics
bio: Dr. Priya Patel is a certified Invisalign Provider and holds specialized expertise in straightening teeth for kids, teens, and adults. She focuses on custom biomechanics and patient comfort to deliver beautiful, straight smiles. She keeps up-to-date with digital scan planning to reduce treatment times.
education: MDS in Orthodontics - King George's Medical University, Lucknow
BDS - Nair Hospital Dental College, Mumbai
fellowships: Advanced Lingual Orthodontics training - Seoul, South Korea
Member of World Federation of Orthodontists (WFO)

name: Dr. Rohan Verma
specialization: Microscope Root Canal, Retreatment, Regenerative Endodontics
bio: Dr. Rohan Verma specializes in saving diseased teeth through painless, microscope-guided root canals. He utilizes advanced rotary instrumentation and warm vertical compaction techniques to complete procedures in a single session. His gentle approach is highly appreciated by anxious patients.
education: MDS in Conservative Dentistry & Endodontics - SDM College of Dental Sciences, Dharwad
BDS - Manipal College of Dental Sciences
fellowships: Diploma in Laser Dentistry - SOLA Academy, Vienna
Member of Indian Association of Conservative Dentistry and Endodontics (IACDE)

name: Dr. Sneha Reddy
specialization: Child Dentistry, Preventive Sealants, Nitrous Oxide Sedation
bio: Dr. Sneha Reddy is dedicated to creating friendly, warm, and positive dental experiences for young children. She specializes in preventive dental care, dental trauma management, and pediatric treatments under conscious sedation, ensuring that kids grow up with healthy, cavity-free smiles.
education: MDS in Pediatric & Preventive Dentistry - Bapuji Dental College, Davangere
fellowships: Conscious Sedation Clinical Training - London, UK
Member of Indian Society of Pedodontics and Preventive Dentistry (ISPPD)
